issues.sample: I BOUGHT THIS SUV IN MAY 2014.  ABOUT TWO WEEKS AFTER MY WIFE AND I BOTH NOTICED THAT THE VEHICLE SHUDDERS AT 20 MPH WHEN YOU APPLY GAS.  IT STARTED GETTING WORSE AND WE CALLED THE DEALER WHO SCHEDULED A REVIEW.  THEY EVENTUALLY INSTALLED A NEW TRANSMISSION.  WE ARE ABOUT 4 WEEKS

PURCHASED NEW 2014 QX60 HYBRID EQUIPPED WITH TECHNOLOGY PACKAGE, INCLUDING INTELLIGENT BRAKE ASSIST WITH FORWARD COLLISION WARNING, AND DISTANCE CONTROL ASSIST.  INITIALLY THE ONLY ISSUE WAS THE VEHICLE HESITATING WHEN STARTING FROM A STOP.  THE DEALERSHIP CLAIMED THE VEHICLE NEE

narrative.headline: What 2014 Infiniti Qx60 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 229 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (52% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
